data.name: Horny Mage Chronicles
data.detailed_description:
Meet Cute Witches!

Get Along With Them!

Train In the Ancient Art Of Sex Magic?

Horny Mage Chronicles is set in a world where magic is real and dangerous. A succubus has attacked your home, leaving you the only one to have escaped. A mysterious witch has rescued you, and proposes that you defeat the succubus... with your dick?

Meet Sexy Witches!

Meet and get to know several sexy witches, all of whom will help out with your "training" as you try to master the art of sex magic!

Engage In Sex-Combat Training

Learn the ancient art of sex-magic, which involves.... repeatedly playing with sexy magical ladies?

Train Your "Stats" by... being lewd?

View 20+ fully animated 2d scenes, with each girl having a variety of encounters for you to see.

Play it risky and get them pregnant?

Fully interactive and repeatable pregnancy mechanics so you can play it risky to your heart's content! All for the sake of your training, of course!

Features include:

  • 20+ fully animated hand-drawn adult scenes to enjoy!

  • Several sexy witches to seduce (or be seduced by!)

  • Unique training minigames to engage in and please your newfound witchy friends

  • A sarcastic familiar cat who grades your performance at every turn

  • Train your stats up.... by feeling them up? Level up your ability to fuck by engaging in special training!

  • Fully-toggleable birth control magic for each witch if you want to play it risky.

data.short_description: A succubus has attacked your home, leaving you the only one to have escaped. A mysterious witch has rescued you, and proposes that you defeat the succubus... with your body?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 2GH Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 280X / GeForce GTX 760
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: AMD FX-6300 / Intel Core i5-4590
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 290 / GeForce GTX 1050 Ti
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
